name: rabbit-feature
summary: Owns the rabbit-feature-touch orchestration skill (active build source). Dispatcher-side surface; executor-side (tdd-step.py, dispatch-tdd-subagent.py, 9-step cycle) lives in tdd-subagent.
deprecation_criterion: When feature-touch orchestration is natively handled by the rabbit CLI or by Claude Code's native workflow mechanism.
spec_no_change_reason: BUG-2 is a metadata sync only — no new invariants per impl-suggestion; the existing constitutional 'read nothing outside the contract' rule is sufficient
